title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at H&M India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at H&M India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with H&M India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About H&M India:
H&M India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India!
